intent_interview_contract.goal: Refactor the notification settings page to reduce TTI
non_goals: Do not touch email notification logic
Do not change the visual design or component hierarchy
constraints: Must not break existing notification preferences stored in localStorage
Must remain under 200ms TTI on a mid-range mobile device
acceptance_criteria: Notification settings page loads in under 200ms on Lighthouse mobile simulation
All existing user notification preferences are preserved after the refactor
No regression in notification delivery behavior
